finding: When the ATM git wrapper hit ENAMETOOLONG, the fallback path required knowing that pre-commit reads ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID and related ATM_COMMIT_* variables, not the more obvious ATM_TASK_ID variables.
expectedBehavior: Fallback commands should be fully copyable and should set the exact hook-visible environment variables. First-layer skills should expose the commit env names when a governed git fallback is required.
evidenceOrRepro: Direct git commit and a Node spawn with ATM_TASK_ID still showed hook data.taskId=null and ATM_CROSS_TASK_MUTATION_BLOCKED. The hook source uses process.env.ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID; using ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID moved the commit to the next protected-state check.
followUp: Update ATM git wrapper failure guidance, Codex/Claude skills, and hook docs to document ATM_COMMIT_ACTOR_ID, ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID, ATM_COMMIT_CLAIM_ID, ATM_COMMIT_SESSION_ID, and ATM_COMMIT_LANE_SESSION_ID.
